New Revision: 354734

Log:
  - Update to 2.7

  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports at robakdesign.com>

Modified:

Modified: head/comms/py-serial/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/comms/py-serial/Makefile	Wed May 21 08:26:43 2014	(r354733)
+++ head/comms/py-serial/Makefile	Wed May 21 09:02:05 2014	(r354734)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	serial
-PORTVERSION=	2.6
+PORTVERSION=	2.7
 CATEGORIES=	comms python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

Modified: head/comms/py-serial/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/comms/py-serial/distinfo	Wed May 21 08:26:43 2014	(r354733)
+++ head/comms/py-serial/distinfo	Wed May 21 09:02:05 2014	(r354734)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

Modified: head/comms/py-serial/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/comms/py-serial/pkg-descr	Wed May 21 08:26:43 2014	(r354733)
+++ head/comms/py-serial/pkg-descr	Wed May 21 09:02:05 2014	(r354734)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ backends for Python running on Windows, 
 compliant system), Jython, and IronPython (.NET and Mono).  The module
 named "serial" automatically selects the appropriate backend.
 
-WWW: http://pyserial.sourceforge.net/
+WWW: http://pyserial.sourceforge.net

 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/serial/tools/list_ports_posix.pyo
